overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world game showing horseback riding through a misty mountain forest. The player follows a horse-drawn carriage along a winding dirt trail toward a remote wooden cabin, with tall pines and rocky cliffs lining the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain forest trail with rocky cliffs

agents.ego_description: riding horseback along a winding dirt trail through dense pine forest

entered.detail: Dense forest of tall evergreen trees lining both sides of the trail
Steep rocky mountain face rising on the left side of the path
Winding dirt path cutting through the grassy meadow
Large rocks and boulders scattered among the trees on the right

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a tranquil mountain trail winding through dense pine forest. The camera moves steadily forward along the dirt path, flanked by tall evergreen trees and a steep rocky cliff face on the left. The overcast sky creates diffused lighting across the grassy terrain.

events.description: horse-drawn carriage enters from the left side of the trail and moves ahead along the path

agents.ego_description: following behind a horse-drawn carriage along the winding forest trail

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving steadily along the trail ahead of the player

segments.scene_description: A horse-drawn carriage enters from the left and moves ahead along the trail, with the player following on horseback. The path continues through the dense pine forest, passing scattered boulders on the right side as the rocky cliff remains visible in the distance on the left.

events.description: small wooden cabin comes into view ahead in the forest clearing

agents.ego_description: continuing to follow the carriage as it approaches the remote cabin

notable_agents.action: carriage approaching the wooden cabin ahead on the trail

entered.detail: Rustic dark wooden cabin with pitched roof situated in a small clearing ahead
Wooden cross or signpost near the cabin entrance

segments.scene_description: The trail opens into a small clearing where a rustic wooden cabin comes into view ahead. The player continues following the carriage toward the cabin, passing a wooden signpost on the left. The rocky cliff face fades into the distance as the dense pine trees draw closer to the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a mountain trail that transitions from a secluded forest path into a small clearing featuring a rustic cabin. It begins by gliding through a dense pine forest under an overcast sky, with a steep rocky cliff face looming on the left. As the camera advances, a horse-drawn carriage enters from the left and leads the way forward, passing scattered boulders while the cliff remains a distant presence. The scene then opens up as the trail leaves the dense tree line, passing a wooden signpost on the left before finally arriving at the wooden cabin ahead.
